cards.name: Broken Prospects
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if 3 or more different treasure tokens were Delved by your warband this battle round or if a treasure token held by an enemy fighter at the start of the battle round was Delved by your warband this battle round.

cards.name: Against the Odds
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if an odd-numbered treasure token was Delved by your warband this battle round.

cards.name: Lost in the Depths
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if no friendly fighters are adjacent and any friendly fighters are not slain.

cards.name: Desolate Homeland
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if there are 1 or fewer treasure tokens in friendly territory.

cards.name: Torn Landscape
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if there are 2 or fewer treasure tokens on the battlefield.

cards.name: Strip the Realm
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if there are no treasure tokens on the battlefield or if no enemy fighters hold any treasure tokens.

cards.name: Aggressive Claimant
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target was in neutral territory, or the target was holding a treasure token when you picked them to be the target of that Attack and is no longer holding that treasure token.

cards.name: Claim the Prize
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter Delves in enemy territory. If you are the underdog, that Delve can be in friendly territory instead. Restricted

cards.name: Delving for Wealth
cards.text: Score this immediately after your warband Delves for the third or subsequent time this combat phase. Restricted

cards.name: Share the Load
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter Moves, if that fighter and any other friendly fighters are each on feature tokens.

cards.name: Hostile Takeover
cards.text: Score this immediately after the second or subsequent Attack made by your warband that was not part of a Charge.

cards.name: Careful Survey
cards.text: Score this immediately after an Action step if there is a friendly fighter in each territory.

cards.name: Sidestep
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: Prideful Duellist
cards.text: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the attacker is in enemy territory. Heal the attacker.

cards.name: Commanding Stride
cards.text: Push your leader up to 3 hexes. That push must end in a starting hex.

cards.name: Crumbling Mine
cards.text: Pick a treasure token that is not held. Flip that treasure token.

cards.name: Explosive Charges
cards.text: Domain: Friendly fighters have +1 Move while using Charge abilities. This effect persists until the end of the battle round or until another Domain card is played.

cards.name: Wary Delver
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter with any Charge tokens. Give that fighter a Guard token.

cards.name: Brash Scout
cards.text: Play this immediately after you make an Attack roll for a fighter in enemy territory. Re-roll 1 dice in that Attack roll. If you are the underdog, you can re-roll each dice in that Attack roll instead.

cards.name: Sudden Blast
cards.text: Pick an enemy fighter adjacent to a friendly fighter. Give that enemy fighter a Stagger token.

cards.name: Tunnelling Terror
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter with no Move or Charge tokens. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, and then place that fighter in an empty stagger hex. Then, give that fighter a Charge token. If you are the underdog, you can give that fighter a Move token instead.

cards.name: Trapped Cache
cards.text: Pick an undamaged enemy fighter within 1 hex of a treasure token. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

cards.name: Great Speed
cards.text: This fighter have +1 Move.

cards.name: Swift Step
cards.text: Quick: Immediately after this fighter has Charged, you can push this fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: Burrowing Strike
cards.text:
Melee Attack action
{icon:hex} 2 {icon:sword} 2 {icon:damage} 2
This weapon has +1 Attack dice while this fighter has any Stagger tokens or is on a feature token.

cards.name: Tough Enough
cards.text: While this fighter is in enemy territory, Save rolls for this fighter cannot be affected by Cleave and Ensnare.

cards.name: Canny Sapper
cards.text: Sneaky: Immediately after you play a Ploy in a Power step, you can remove this fighter from the battlefield. Place this fighter in an empty stagger hex or in an empty starting hex in friendly territory, and then discard this card.

cards.name: Impossibly Quick
cards.text:
This fighter has +1 Save.
Immediately discard this Upgrade after an enemy fighter's failed Attack if this fighter was the target.

cards.name: Linebreaker
cards.text: This fighter's weapons have Brutal.

cards.name: Excavating Blast
cards.text:
Ranged Attack action
{icon:hex} 3 {icon:hammer} 2 {icon:damage} 1
This weapon has Stagger while this fighter is in enemy territory.

cards.name: Gloryseeker
cards.text: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous if the target has a Health characteristic of 4 or more.

cards.name: Frenzy of Greed
cards.text: While this fighter is on a treasure token in enemy territory or is in a stagger hex, Save rolls for this fighter are not affected by Cleave and Ensnare and this fighter cannot be given Stagger tokens.
